category_sources: source_facts.description says it examines code for possible security weaknesses; official homepage describes scanning C/C++ source for potential security flaws: https://dwheeler.com/flawfinder/
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and current_curation.display-name are `flawfinder`; official homepage heading is Flawfinder: https://dwheeler.com/flawfinder/
docs_sources: Official homepage has a Documentation section linking to the PDF manual: https://dwheeler.com/flawfinder/
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage says Flawfinder is hosted on SourceForge and points to source code/latest drafts in version control: https://dwheeler.com/flawfinder/
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage identify command-line source scanning for C/C++ security weaknesses: https://dwheeler.com/flawfinder/
